occupation: SVP, Enterprise Solutions at Vistar Media
headline: SVP, Enterprise Solutions at Vistar Media

experiences.title: Business Technology Analyst
experiences.description:
As part of new client deployment projects, interfaced with client business and technology teams to define requirements and implement customized business workflows.

Managed development of new product features, including design, testing, and documentation within an  agile development framework.

Trained new hires on system technology and firm processes.

experiences.title: Technology Education
experiences.description:
Designed and led robotics/programming workshops for students (4th to 12th grade) throughout the city of Philadelphia. 
Led computer training sessions for library employees.

volunteer_work.title: Mentor
volunteer_work.description: I was matched with an NYC student whom I coached primarily for college readiness throughout their high school career. This included weekly correspondence and in-person meetings.
